nearMe.answerHeading: Nail salon in Trois-Rivières — Ongles Rivières at Centre Les Rivières
nearMe.answerBlock: Ongles Rivières is the nail salon to know in Trois-Rivières, located at Centre Les Rivières, 4225 boulevard des Forges. Boulevard des Forges is the main commercial street in Trois-Rivières, steps from the historic Vieux-Trois-Rivières district and close to the Saint-Philippe neighbourhood. Unlike our Québec City locations, this salon serves the Mauricie region: clients travel from Cap-de-la-Madeleine, Shawinigan, Sainte-Anne-de-la-Pérade, and the broader Bois-Francs area to visit us in the heart of the city. At Ongles Rivières you will find the full range of nail services: nail enhancements, fills, manicures, and pedicures, all delivered with the strict hygiene standards our team stands behind. Every tool is sterilized after each client and every workstation is sanitized between services. Centre Les Rivières has free on-site parking and is served by Trois-Rivières transit along boulevard des Forges. You can book an appointment online, phone us, or simply walk in; we do our best to accommodate everyone. We look forward to seeing you in Trois-Rivières.
nearMe.body: Centre Les Rivières is on boulevard des Forges, near rue Notre-Dame and the downtown core of Trois-Rivières. Free parking on site. The salon is reachable by the transit line serving boulevard des Forges.
nearMe.metaTitle: Nail salon in Trois-Rivières — Ongles Rivières | Centre Les Rivières
nearMe.metaDescription: Nail salon in Trois-Rivières: nail enhancements, fills, manicures and pedicures at Ongles Rivières, Centre Les Rivières. Walk-ins welcome.
